---
title: "Evolutionary Game Theory and Collective Behavior"
subtitle: "ABM-004 | Track C — Agent-Based Modeling"
description: "The mathematical theory of strategic interaction, evolution of cooperation, and collective phenomena emergent from simple agent rules."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Evolutionary Game Theory and Collective Behavior

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
